_note: Mini TUF-style key registry (v6 Phase 3). The `role` field is LOAD-BEARING (Round 2 #6): every verify surface that resolves a key by NAME must match role (heal-proof-signer vs attestation-signer) against the artifact type AND the in-payload type tag (bundle_version airbag.heal/v1 vs attestation_version airbag.attestation/v1), or a counter-signed attestation could be re-wrapped as a SIGNED-VERIFIED heal. The COMMITTED PEMs stay the authoritative offline trust root; this served registry is a convenience for parties without the repo. Rotation is TUF-style: a new `version` is signed by the PREVIOUS version's key (2-role only; full 4-role TUF is out of scope). Generated at setup (infra/kms-setup.sh), never a live KMS call in the request path.
